name: Aurora Crown Commune

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Aurora Crown Commune Innkeeper is the locality-facing innkeeper interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for provides lodging, local gossip, traveler warnings, and emergency favors.

Aurora Crown Commune Market Clerk is the locality-facing market clerk interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for manages queues, forms, stall assignments, and the practical memory of who came through.
Aurora Crown Commune Shrine Attendant is the locality-facing shrine attendant interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for maintains offerings, notices breaches, and guides minor local rites.

Aurora Crown Commune Porter is the locality-facing porter interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for moves freight, luggage, and urgent loads while absorbing gossip from thresholds, yards, and lanes.

Aurora Crown Commune Scribe is the locality-facing scribe interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for records transactions, testimony, obligations, and quiet corrections that later decide public outcomes.
Aurora Crown Commune Labor Foreman is the locality-facing labor foreman interface in Aurora Crown Commune, useful for coordinates shifts, crews, protection, and blame when practical work goes wrong.

street_level_faction_presence.what_they_look_like_in_practice: Authority appears through uniforms, seals, ledgers, ritual markers, escorts, tools, queue control, and which people others make way for.
street_level_faction_presence.who_benefits: Those who know the rules, fulfill obligations, or ride aligned patronage tend to benefit first.
street_level_faction_presence.who_fears_them: Debtors, irregular operators, exposed workers, and those with fragile standing often fear enforcement or scrutiny most.

greetings: Survival-aware greetings often include weather, dome status, or route condition before personal matters.
hospitality_rules: Warmth, shelter, and containment courtesy define good hospitality more than abundance.
taboo_topics: mocking mutation scars or dome necessity
faith_etiquette: aurora wonder and communal endurance create solemn but not joyless ritual conduct
suspicious_behavior: moving between communes with unexplained residue or devices
outsider_mistakes: confusing reserved behavior for coldness rather than resource discipline

ordinary_life_surface.what_people_do_all_day: Heat management, repair, research, route timing, preserved food routines, and aurora or containment watch shape daily existence.
ordinary_life_surface.what_places_feel_like: Air smells of ozone, lamp oil, snow-wet cloth, boiled broth, resin, and metal warmed too near heat sources. Sounds are quieter and more careful than in temperate polities.
ordinary_life_surface.home_and_guest_norms: Communal heat spaces, compact sleeping arrangements, layered fabric barriers, and emergency stores define homes across class lines.

public_rumors: People say something in Aurora Crown Commune has grown more tense than the officials admit.
Merchants claim the last busy cycle in Aurora Crown Commune left someone unpaid or publicly embarrassed.
half_true_rumors: A respected local figure in Aurora Crown Commune is said to be protecting someone they should have exposed.
faction_planted_rumors: A faction-friendly story in Aurora Crown Commune insists that harsher oversight is the only thing keeping things from collapse.
religious_warnings: Some locals in Aurora Crown Commune treat current unease as a warning rather than ordinary trouble.
trade_concerns: Freight, labor, or supply movement around Aurora Crown Commune is said to be more fragile than the ledgers suggest.
criminal_whispers: Quiet talk in Aurora Crown Commune says favors can still be bought if one knows who keeps the informal door open.
historical_misconceptions: Older residents of Aurora Crown Commune repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

contradiction_aware_myth_versions.claim: Older residents of Aurora Crown Commune repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

travel_and_transition_texture.feel: Travel between communes requires escorts, weather judgment, shelter knowledge, and respect for handoff custom at safe points.
travel_and_transition_texture.checkpoint_behavior: Checkpoint, gate, dock, or entry custom reveals who is trusted, who is processed, and who is delayed.
travel_and_transition_texture.caravan_or_route_custom: Route handoff norms matter; escorts, seals, witnesses, or weather-reading often determine who moves next.
travel_and_transition_texture.regional_handoff_custom: Responsibility for travelers and goods visibly changes at territorial boundaries.

text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.where_strangers_gather: At the most practical public node: inn bench, queue court, market edge, dock gate, shrine steps, or freight lane.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.public_notice_drawing_attention: A new notice in Aurora Crown Commune is drawing comment because it changes someone’s movement, cost, or safety.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.visible_tension: People in Aurora Crown Commune are acting as though a pressure everyone knows about has become harder to ignore.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.private_trouble: Someone respectable in Aurora Crown Commune is privately entangled in an obligation they cannot publicly explain.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.one_hour_entanglement: A newcomer in Aurora Crown Commune could be pulled into a dispute, delivery problem, witness request, or rumor test within an hour of arrival.

relationship_and_reputation_consequences.trust: People are remembered for whether they hold steady in crisis and whether they endanger others through negligence.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_good_memory: Keeping one’s word under visible pressure, showing correct public respect, and not creating avoidable trouble.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_bad_memory: Public embarrassment, broken obligations, opportunism during crisis, and forcing others to absorb avoidable risk.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_favors_matter: Timely introductions, queue priority, sealed testimony, repair help, escorting, storage, ritual guidance, and quiet omission when deserved.

scene_starter_inventory: overheard dispute at a public threshold
missing person or missing ledger concern
faction test of loyalty or usefulness
strange celestial sign interpreted three different ways
